title_en: Fun Vowel Review Time! (a, eo, o, u, eu, i, ae, e)

scenes.ko: 안녕하세요, 여러분! 지난주에 배운 단모음과 단어들을 함께 복습해 볼까요? 오늘은 특별히 퀴즈와 게임으로 즐겁게 복습할 거예요.
scenes.en: Hello, everyone! Shall we review the single vowels and words we learned last week? Today, we'll have a fun review with quizzes and games.
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook cheomseongdae observatory from a low angle on a starry night, gentle bird flying, flower field, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 먼저, 가장 기본적인 모음 '오'와 '우'를 다시 한번 살펴볼까요? 이 모음들이 들어간 단어들은 무엇이 있었죠?
scenes.en: First, let's take another look at the most basic vowels 'o' and 'u'. What words did we learn that contained these vowels?
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook close-up of the lit wooden palace pavilions' intricate roof at night, with reflections in the water, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 다음으로, 발음하기 조금 헷갈릴 수 있는 '으'와 '이'입니다. '의사'와 '아이'를 떠올려보세요.
scenes.en: Next are 'eu' and 'i', which can be a bit tricky to pronounce. Think of 'doctor' and 'child'.
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook medium shot of a tranquil section of the pond with lily pads and the distant glowing pavilions at night, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 이제 '애'와 '에' 모음을 복습할 시간이에요. '배'와 '게'는 어떻게 발음했는지 기억나시나요?
scenes.en: Now it's time to review the vowels 'ae' and 'e'. Do you remember how 'pear' and 'crab' were pronounced?
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook cheomseongdae observatory, a wide shot under a clear star-filled night sky, flower field, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 자, 이제 첫 번째 퀴즈 시간! 화면에 나오는 그림을 보고 알맞은 단어와 모음을 맞춰보세요. '모자'와 '포도'는 어떤 모음으로 시작할까요?
scenes.en: Alright, it's time for our first quiz! Look at the picture on the screen and match the correct word and vowel. What vowels do 'hat' and 'grape' start with?
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook panoramic view of the entire Donggung and Wolji palace complex at night, serene and expansive, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 잘하고 있어요! 그럼 '바나나'와 '사과'는 어떤 모음이 들어갔었죠? 빈칸에 들어갈 모음을 맞춰보세요!
scenes.en: You're doing great! So, what vowels were in 'banana' and 'apple'? Guess the missing vowels!
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook a stone lantern glowing softly near the water's edge at night, with the palace in the background, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 이번에는 단어 짝맞추기 게임입니다! '기차'와 '나무' 같은 단어들을 그림과 함께 짝지어 볼까요?
scenes.en: This time, it's a word matching game! Shall we pair words like 'train' and 'tree' with their pictures?
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook close-up of the pond's surface at night with gentle ripples and a single reflection of a pavilion light, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 마지막 짝맞추기 문제! '구두'와 '여우' 그림을 보고 올바른 단어를 찾아 연결해보세요. 집중하면 모두 맞힐 수 있을 거예요!
scenes.en: Final matching question! Look at the pictures of 'shoes' and 'fox' and find the correct words to connect them. You can get them all right if you focus!
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook cheomseongdae observatory, a close-up on the stone base with an open ancient scroll nearby at night, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9

scenes.ko: 오늘 복습 정말 잘했어요! 이렇게 다양한 방법으로 모음과 단어를 익히면 한국어가 훨씬 재미있고 쉬워질 거예요. 다음 시간에 또 만나요!
scenes.en: You did a great job reviewing today! Learning vowels and words in these various ways will make Korean much more fun and easy. See you next time!
scenes.bg_prompt: soft pastel storybook overhead view of the illuminated Donggung and Wolji palace complex at night, showing the overall layout and beauty, thick friendly outlines, flat colors, no text, no modern people, leave left third and lower area open, 16:9
